name: Seth Shoultes — Writing & Skills
description: Blog posts, brain learnings, and installable Agent Skills from sethshoultes.com. Surfaces a public catalog any AI agent can enumerate without credentials.

tools_summary.name: list_posts
tools_summary.description: List all blog posts with metadata (title, slug, subtitle, date, read time, og_image).

tools_summary.name: get_post
tools_summary.description: Fetch the full HTML body of a blog post by slug.

tools_summary.name: list_skills
tools_summary.description: List installable Agent Skills from building-with-ai-skills.
